chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA C.P.No.D-418 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ For hearing of main case. 10.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Shakir Khan, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, A.A.G, Sindh. = * = * = * = * = * = Mr. Nisar Ahmed A. Soomro has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of private respondent, it is taken on record. Statements have been filed on behalf of the Senior Superintendent of Police, Kashmore, and SHO, P.S Kashmore, those are taken on record and copies whereof are provided to learned counsel for the petitioner. Investigating Officer of the case is present in the Court and he has recorded 161 Cr.PC statement of Mst.Parveen Bibi, copy whereof is taken on record, wherein she has denied her abduction. Investigating Officer of the case is directed to submit supplementary challan of the case before the Magistrate having jurisdiction within three days hereinafter, on the basis of 161 Cr.PC statement of Mst.Parveen Bibi. Learned counsel for the petitioner being satisfied with the above event does not press the instant constitutional petition, it is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E
